category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks Kubernetes deployments against CIS Benchmark; official README says it checks secure deployment against CIS Kubernetes Benchmark.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name are kube-bench.
docs_sources: Official repository contains a docs directory and README links to documentation for running kube-bench.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/aquasecurity/kube-bench, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Kubernetes security and CIS Benchmark checks; source_facts.executables lists kube-bench.
